alowNullTooltip: Th selection of this field, set 0 to a valid value. (in case of device reboot it might become an error).
infoToCustomConfiglabel: do configuration in custom-config of a state
justTypeNumber: Attention, only data points of type number can be selected
logFallbackAsWarningTooltip: enable this option to to log the fallback to zero and the next Value as warning
maxDifferenceTooltip: max difference, that might be detected. (0 for disable this function)
valueNameTooltip: inset the Name of the state, which will be displayed in the channel folder later.
